response:
Emily gathered twenty-four blue fruits while David picked fifteen additional ones making his total thirty-nine berries.
***
Sophia harvested thirteen items since David collected three times that amount for his own pile of sweet treats.
***
The trio combined their harvest to create eight batches of delicious muffins using nine berries per single serving.
***
Selling every batch for five dollars resulted in forty dollars earned by the young people in their community youth
